name: rancis fluggerbutter |~* AU *~|~* WRECK IT RALPH *~|~* SUGAR RUSH *~|
description:
Rancis Fluggerbutter is a character from the game, Sugar Rush. He is voiced by Jamie Elman. His theme is based on Reese's Peanut Butter Cups, and Hershey kisses. His signature kart is the Kit-Kart (a play on "Kit-Kat"). In Sugar Rush Speedway, both he and Adorabeezle Winterpop are unlocked by completing the third track, Frosty Rally.

Official Bio

Rancis Fluggerbutter: Love Thy Self
"This blazer-wearing boy wonder likes looking in the mirror almost as much as he likes racing. Rancis Fluggerbutter may look like a party on the outside, but he's all business on the inside. He has bright eyes and even brighter ideas, which are reflected in his smooth racing techniques."
creator: Mega_LR4U_RP
